notes: Launch-ready Grade 5 card with reading, vocabulary, journals, writing, questions, informational text, and assessments.
Created from local 5th grade source folder audit.
Source folder includes Celtic mythology stories, vocabulary spreadsheet, and comprehension questions.

book.title: Celtic Mythology
book.description: Source folder includes Celtic mythology stories, vocabulary spreadsheet, and comprehension questions.

weeks.title: Week 13: Celtic Mythology Part 1 (Days 61-65)
vocabulary: Heroes: define and use in a sentence
text evidence: choose a detail that supports your answer
journal: What did this week's reading teach you about Heroes? Use one detail from the text.
Which character, god, hero, or creature was most interesting this week? Explain why.
writing: Write an evidence paragraph about a character, hero, or setting.
Add a stronger detail or quotation to one answer.
questions: What is the main problem, quest, or conflict in this section?
Which detail best shows a character trait or important theme?
How does the setting or culture shape the story?
What lesson or big idea can a reader take from this section?
assessment: Weekly vocabulary check and comprehension response.
Review day: discuss answers, revise writing, and prepare for the next reading set.
